notes: Unit floor partial with dense W1 walls, doors, centerlines, and MEP openings.

rationale.evidence: Definition name embeds 평면도 and layers are dominated by W1 (54), plus A-DOOR, CEN, STL, and 설비OPEN. Sampled LINEs on W1 form long orthogonal runs at architectural scales (thousands of units). HATCH/LWPOLYLINE on 설비OPEN are secondary openings, not the main content.
rationale.rule: Blocks named as floor-plan units with abundant W1/W2 orthogonal LINEs plus door/MEP layers are 평면 부분도 with high wall_likelihood; prefer W1/W2 LINEs as wall candidates over CEN.
rationale.counterfactual: If W1 were absent and content were only CEN/TEXT or a single FUR-layer furniture outline, wall_likelihood would drop sharply and role might flip to 심볼/가구/기타.
rationale.uncertainty: Only 30 of 102 entities are sampled, so some W1 segments could be trim/detail rather than structural walls; true wall thickness pairing is not fully visible.

notes: Another unit floor partial: W1-heavy walls with doors, hatches, and equipment openings.

rationale.evidence: W1 has 59 entities and samples show long axis-aligned W1 LINEs forming room envelopes; A-DOOR, CEN, 40HAT, and 설비OPEN support a plan fragment. BBox spans tens of meters in drawing units, consistent with a dwelling unit plan.
rationale.rule: High W1 count with orthogonal long LINEs co-occurring with door and opening layers indicates a floor-plan partial, not a symbol or furniture block.
rationale.counterfactual: If the histogram were mostly FUR/FUR-KIT with a sub-meter bbox and no W1/W2, role would become 가구 and wall_likelihood near 0.
rationale.uncertainty: CEN lines are mixed into samples and could be mistaken for walls without layer filtering; unsampled entities may refine wall continuity.

notes: Large unit plan with W1/W2, gypsum, insulation, doors, kitchen, and tile finishes.

rationale.evidence: 639 entities with W1=129 and W2=105 plus 4GYP/7GYP/INS/INSUL/DOOR/KITC/TIL is a full residential unit floor plan. Sampled INS lines form paired parallel runs typical of wall thickness. Furniture layers exist but are minority versus wall systems.
rationale.rule: Large multi-layer architectural unit blocks with dominant W1/W2 and finish/insulation stacks are 평면 부분도 with very high wall_likelihood.
rationale.counterfactual: If W1/W2/INS counts collapsed to near zero and FUR dominated with a tiny bbox, judgment would flip to 가구.
rationale.uncertainty: Sampled entities skew to INSUL INSERTs and INS LINEs; exact W1/W2 wall handles in the sample are limited, so listed wall candidates rely on INS shell lines that usually track walls.

notes: Roof-plan overlay for 111: centerlines, 7RF outlines, rain leaders, and roof fans.

rationale.evidence: Name suffix ARF and layers 7RF/M_2/CEN dominate; entities include 우수관_100A and 무동력휀300 inserts. W1 appears only as fan INSERT hosts, not wall LINEs. Content is a roof-level plan fragment tied to unit 111.
rationale.rule: Roof-plan partials still count as 평면 부분도 when they show plan geometry of a building level, but wall_likelihood stays low if W1/W2 wall LINEs are absent.
rationale.counterfactual: Presence of many long W1/W2 orthogonal LINEs forming rooms would raise wall_likelihood; if only a lone equipment INSERT remained, role could shift to 심볼.
rationale.uncertainty: 7RF LWPOLYLINEs might encode parapet/roof edges that behave like walls, but without vertex coordinates their wall-likeness cannot be confirmed from this projection.

notes: Sparse roof-plan variant: CEN grid plus 8RF polylines and label text.

rationale.evidence: Only 11 entities: CEN LINEs, two 8RF LWPOLYLINEs, and DEFTXT '111ARF2'. No W1/W2, doors, or finishes. Clearly a simplified roof-plan companion, not furniture or dimension cache.
rationale.rule: Thin RF/CEN-only named roof plan variants remain 평면 부분도 with near-zero wall_likelihood when no wall layers are present.
rationale.counterfactual: Adding dense W1 room envelopes would raise wall_likelihood; reducing to a single annotated INSERT symbol would favor 심볼.
rationale.uncertainty: 8RF polyline geometry is not coordinate-expanded, so whether those outlines are parapets versus graphic frames is unknown.

notes: Unit 111b floor plan with W1/W2, insulation, kitchen, doors, and finishes.

rationale.evidence: 546 entities with W1=122 and W2=77 plus INS/INSUL/DOOR/KITC/TIL mirror a full unit plan. Sampled W2/INS pairs show parallel offsets typical of wall thickness; MC lines act as related structural/center bands.
rationale.rule: Residential unit definitions with large W1+W2 counts and architectural finish layers are 평면 부분도; select W2/W1/INS orthogonal LINEs as wall candidates.
rationale.counterfactual: If W1/W2 vanished and only FUR/KITC inserts remained in a small bbox, role would flip toward 가구.
rationale.uncertainty: Sample is INSUL-heavy; many true W1 wall handles are not shown, so wall_line_handles under-represent the wall set.

notes: Roof plan for 111b: CEN, 7RF, rain pipes, and passive fans.

rationale.evidence: BRF naming, CEN-majority LINEs, 7RF polylines, 우수관 and 무동력휀 inserts match a roof-level plan overlay. W1 hosts fan blocks rather than wall strokes. Entity count is small (24) versus unit floor plans.
rationale.rule: Named roof-plan companions of unit plans are 평면 부분도 with low wall_likelihood unless explicit wall LINEs appear on W1/W2.
rationale.counterfactual: Substantial W1/W2 room geometry would raise wall_likelihood; a solitary fan block without plan context would be 심볼.
rationale.uncertainty: NON and 7RF polylines may include parapet walls, but coordinates are unavailable so they are not listed as wall_line_handles.

notes: Minimal roof-plan variant with CEN lines and 8RF outlines only.

rationale.evidence: 14 entities confined to CEN, 8RF, and label text '111BRF2'. No doors, walls, or furniture layers. Pattern matches simplified roof plan sheet content.
rationale.rule: CEN+RF-only roof variants of a unit plan stay classified as 평면 부분도 with negligible wall_likelihood.
rationale.counterfactual: Introduction of W1/W2 wall networks would increase wall_likelihood; collapse to one equipment INSERT would suggest 심볼.
rationale.uncertainty: Without 8RF vertex data, parapet-versus-frame distinction cannot be resolved from the projection alone.

notes: Large 130a unit plan: W1/W2 walls, gypsum/insulation stacks, doors, and much furniture.

rationale.evidence: 784 entities with W1=113, W2=103, GYP/INS/INSUL/DOOR/TIL plus FUR=153. Sampled W2 LINEs form continuous orthogonal envelopes with paired INS/4GYP offsets—classic wall assemblies in plan.
rationale.rule: Unit floor plans combining heavy W1/W2 with layered wall assemblies are 평면 부분도; furniture layers do not override when wall systems dominate counts.
rationale.counterfactual: If the block contained only FUR geometry at furniture scale without W1/W2, role would become 가구.
rationale.uncertainty: FUR count is high, so some regions may be furniture-dense; projection sample does not map which enclosed rooms are walls versus cabinetry.

notes: 130a variant unit plan with walls, openings, kitchen/closet inserts, and finishes.

rationale.evidence: Nearly identical profile to 130a: W1=114, W2=103, door/insulation/tile layers, large bbox. Sampled W1/W2 LINEs and INS shells confirm wall geometry; KITC and I-CL-FUR inserts are nested contents, not the block role.
rationale.rule: Variant suffixes (a1) of unit floor plans inherit 평면 부분도 when wall-layer histograms remain dominant.
rationale.counterfactual: Stripping W1/W2/INS while leaving only FUR/KITC inserts at small scale would flip to 가구.
rationale.uncertainty: Sample emphasizes INSUL and 설비OPEN; many wall handles exist but are not listed beyond the visible W1/W2 subset.

notes: 130b unit floor plan with W1/W2, gypsum, insulation, doors, and furniture.

rationale.evidence: 776 entities, W1=104, W2=83, heavy 7GYP/4GYP, DOOR, FUR, INSUL. Sampled 4GYP LINEs are long orthogonal finish faces that track walls; overall composition is a dwelling unit plan.
rationale.rule: When W1/W2 coexist with gypsum/insulation finish stacks at unit scale, classify as 평면 부분도 with high wall_likelihood.
rationale.counterfactual: A FUR-only small block without wall layers would be 가구; dimension-only geometry would be 치수캐시.
rationale.uncertainty: Visible sample lacks explicit W1/W2 LINE handles, so wall_line_handles use 4GYP/MC proxies that usually coincide with walls but are not the wall layer itself.

notes: 84a unit plan with W1/W2, masonry wall layer, doors, openings, and finishes.

rationale.evidence: 527 entities, W1=112, W2=87, plus A02-벽체-조적, DOOR, INS/INSUL, 설비OPEN. Sampled W2 LINEs with paired 4GYP/INS offsets show wall assemblies. Name and scale match a unit floor partial.
rationale.rule: Unit plans whose layers explicitly include wall (W1/W2/벽체) and door systems are 평면 부분도; prefer W2/W1 LINEs as wall_line_handles.
rationale.counterfactual: If wall layers disappeared and only electrical 4ELE ticks remained, role might drift to 기타/심볼 with low wall_likelihood.
rationale.uncertainty: 4ELE samples are not walls; some LV polylines may be louvers/vents rather than walls and were excluded.

notes: 84a1 variant: clear W1 wall runs with gypsum, MC, and centerline structure.

rationale.evidence: Same unit-plan layer signature as 84a (W1/W2 dominant, 벽체-조적, doors, insulation). Sampled W1 LINEs are long orthogonal segments at plan scale—strong wall evidence.
rationale.rule: Variant unit floor definitions keep 평면 부분도 when W1/W2 histograms stay large and sampled W1 LINEs form envelopes.
rationale.counterfactual: Replacing W1 geometry with only CEN grids and labels would collapse wall_likelihood toward roof-overlay levels.
rationale.uncertainty: MC lines can look wall-like; they were deprioritized relative to W1, but some MC may coincide with structural walls.

notes: 84b unit floor plan with insulation shells, W1/W2 counts, doors, and openings.

rationale.evidence: 525 entities with W1=115, W2=89 and full finish/door/MEP stack. Sample focuses on INS LINEs that form paired wall thicknesses; W1 also hosts insert blocks (is/is2) typical inside unit plans.
rationale.rule: High W1/W2 plus INS paired parallels indicate 평면 부분도; wall candidates may be taken from INS when W1 LINEs are under-sampled.
rationale.counterfactual: If histogram were FUR-FIX/FUR-KIT only at ~1m scale, role would be 가구.
rationale.uncertainty: Sampled entities are mostly INS, not W1/W2 LINEs, so listed handles are shell proxies; exact core wall strokes may differ.

notes: 84b1 unit plan variant with walls, door insert, insulation, and MEP openings.

rationale.evidence: W1=111, W2=93 with DOOR insert pd900, INSUL, 설비OPEN, and large bbox. INS LINE samples recreate the same wall-shell pattern as 84b. Overall role is clearly a floor-plan partial.
rationale.rule: Near-duplicate unit variants with retained W1/W2 dominance remain 평면 부분도 with high wall_likelihood.
rationale.counterfactual: Absence of W1/W2/INS and presence of only CEN would make this look like a non-wall reference overlay.
rationale.uncertainty: CEN/MC long lines in the sample are grids/structure references, not selected as walls; misclassification risk remains without style data.

notes: 84c unit plan including bath/kitchen cues, tile hatches, insulation, and W1/W2 walls.

rationale.evidence: 571 entities, W1=105, W2=92, DS-F-BATH, KITC, TIL hatches, INSUL inserts, and INS wall shells. This is a full wet-core-capable unit floor plan rather than a furniture symbol.
rationale.rule: Unit plans with wall layers plus room-type markers (bath/kitchen/tile) are 평면 부분도; minor FUR counts do not change role.
rationale.counterfactual: A block composed solely of FUR/FUR-KIT geometry at furniture bbox scale would be 가구.
rationale.uncertainty: Wall LINE handles on W1/W2 are not in the 30-sample window; INS shells are used as best available wall-like evidence.

notes: 84c1 variant with walls, bath fixtures, faucets, tile, and insulation.

rationale.evidence: Same macroscopic signature as 84c (W1/W2 ~100 each, bath/kitchen/tile/insulation). Samples show INS wall shells, door/window-like inserts (wd/ba), 수전 fixtures, and TIL hatches—contents of a unit plan.
rationale.rule: Fixture inserts (faucet/bath) inside a W1/W2-rich unit definition do not reclassify the block as 심볼; the enclosing plan remains 평면 부분도.
rationale.counterfactual: If the definition contained only the 수전 inserts without wall systems, role would become 심볼.
rationale.uncertainty: Few explicit W1/W2 LINE handles appear in the sample, so wall_line_handles lean on INS/MC; true wall strokes are under-listed.

notes: Furniture-only block on FUR layer with arcs/hatches at furniture scale.

rationale.evidence: All 117 entities sit on FUR. BBox is roughly 192×1200 drawing units—furniture scale, not a unit footprint. Geometry mixes short LINEs, ARCs, and SOLID hatches typical of a drafted furniture symbol/component.
rationale.rule: Single-layer FUR blocks with small bbox and no W1/W2/DOOR plan systems are 가구 with near-zero wall_likelihood.
rationale.counterfactual: If W1/W2 room envelopes and door layers appeared at multi-meter scale, role would flip to 평면 부분도.
rationale.uncertainty: Exact furniture type (chair/cabinet/bed) cannot be read from anonymous A$ handle name and fragmented arc samples alone.

notes: Small FUR-layer furniture outline with arcs; not architectural walls.

rationale.evidence: Entirely FUR (22 entities), bbox about 500×104—compact furniture footprint. LINEs and ARCs form a closed apparatus/outline without wall, door, or centerline layers.
rationale.rule: Pure FUR geometry at sub-room scale is classified as 가구; do not treat furniture edge LINEs as walls.
rationale.counterfactual: Embedding this geometry inside W1-dominated unit content would not change a parent plan’s role, but as a standalone definition it stays 가구 unless wall layers are added.
rationale.uncertainty: Without a readable block name or insert context, the specific furniture class remains ambiguous.

notes: Fixed/kitchen furniture assembly on FUR-FIX and FUR-KIT layers.

rationale.evidence: Layers are exclusively FUR-FIX and FUR-KIT. BBox spans roughly 920×152 units with rectangular LWPOLYLINEs and short LINEs—cabinet/counter module scale. No W1/W2/DOOR/CEN architectural plan stack.
rationale.rule: Blocks whose layers are furniture-fixed/kitchen-only are 가구; wall_likelihood stays ~0 even if some edges are long and orthogonal.
rationale.counterfactual: Presence of W1/W2 wall networks and unit-scale bbox would reclassify as 평면 부분도.
rationale.uncertainty: Cannot confirm whether this is a sink base, island, or closet pack from layer names alone; only the furniture role is clear.
